name: Security Issue
about: Report a security vulnerability
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

## 🔒 Security Issue Report
**⚠️ IMPORTANT: For security vulnerabilities, please email security@lendsphere.xyz instead of creating a public issue.**

This template is for non-sensitive security discussions or general security improvements.

## 📋 Issue Type
- [ ] Vulnerability disclosure
- [ ] Security improvement suggestion
- [ ] Security policy question
- [ ] Other security-related issue

## 📝 Description
A clear description of the security issue or concern.

## 🎯 Impact
What is the potential impact of this security issue?

## 🔍 Details
Please provide as much detail as possible about the security issue.

## 🛡️ Mitigation
If you have suggestions for mitigation, please describe them here.

## 📊 Severity
- [ ] Critical - Immediate risk to users/funds
- [ ] High - Significant security risk
- [ ] Medium - Moderate security concern
- [ ] Low - Minor security improvement

## 🔗 Related Components
Which parts of LendSphere are affected?
- [ ] Smart contracts
- [ ] Frontend application
- [ ] Backend services
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

## 📚 References
Any relevant security standards, best practices, or similar issues.

## 🤝 Confidentiality
- [ ] This information is public
- [ ] This information should be kept confidential

## 📧 Contact Information
For confidential security issues, please contact:
- **Email**: security@lendsphere.xyz
- **PGP Key**: [Available upon request]

---

**Remember**: For actual security vulnerabilities, please report them privately to security@lendsphere.xyz to allow us to fix the issue before it's disclosed to the public.
